scenario.name: Lead Qualification and Voice Call Automation
scenario.description: This scenario automates lead qualification and voice calls using Vapi AI, Airtable, email routing, and Slack notifications.

triggers.description: Triggers when a new lead is added to Airtable.

actions.description: Initiate AI interaction for lead qualification.

parameters.prompt: Ask qualifying questions to the lead.

actions.description: Route qualified leads to sales team.

config.subject: New Qualified Lead
config.body: A new lead has been qualified and requires follow-up.

actions.description: Notify Slack channel of new qualified lead.

config.message: A qualified lead has been added. Please follow up.

actions.description: Initiate voice call with the lead for further qualification.
